folio.label: 116v
folio.l: Betú to me trewe , and I wyl telle ©ow why
Thre thynges certes , shuln ©e wynne ther by
First , loue of Crist , and to ©oure self , honour
And al myn heritage , bothe toun and tour

note.notetxt: 928the first four lines are in a lighter brown.ODR

folio.l: I ©eue it ©ow , maketú chartres as ©ow list
This shal be dou~ , to morwe or the Sonne rist
So wysly god my soule , brynge in to blisse
I preye ©ow first , in couenaunt ©e me kisse
And thougú I be ielous , wyte me nougút
ñe ben so depe , enprented in my thougút
That whan I considre , ©oure beaute
And ther witú al , the vnlikly age of me
I may nougút certes , thougú I shulde deye
For bere to ben , out of ©oure companye
For verray loue , this is witú outen doute
Now kisse me wyf , and late vs rome aboute
¢ This fresshe May , whan she theise wordes herd
Benygnely , to Ianuarie she answer¶
But first and forward , she bygan to wepe
I haue q¶ she , god wot , a soule to kepe
As wel as ©e , and also myn honour
And of my wyfhod , thilke tendre flour
Whicú that I haue assured , in ©oure hond
Whan that the Prest , to ©ow my body bond
Wherfore I wyl answere , in this manere
By the leue of ©ow , that ben my lord so dere
I preye to god , that neuäe dawe the day
That I ne sterue , as foule as wo~man may
If euäe I do , vn to my kyn , that shame
Or ellis if that I , enpeire so my name
That I be fals , and if I do that lak
Do stripe me , and put me in a sak
And in the nexte Ryuer , do me drenche
I am a gentil wo~man , and no wenche
Why speke ©e thus , but men ben euäe vntrewe
And wo~men han of ©ow , repref ay newe
ñe come noon other countenaunce , I leue
But speke to vs , as of vntrust and repreue
And witú that word , she saw where Damyan
Sat in the Bussú , and cougúe she bygan
And witú hire fynger , a signe mad she
That Damyan shulde/ clymbe vp oon a tree
That charged was , witú fruyt , and vp he went
For verraily he knew , al hire entent
And euäy signe , that she coude make
